name: Goldstar Minerals Inc.
summary: Goldstar Minerals Inc. engages in the exploration of mineral properties in the provinces of Qu√É¬©bec, New Brunswick, and Newfoundland, Canada. The company focuses on developing gold and technology metal deposits. It holds interests in the Lake George property located to the west of Fredericton, New Brunswick; the Victoria Lake property situated within Clarendon, Lepreau, and Pennfield Parishes of Charlotte County, New Brunswick; Fortune Property located in the Gasp√É¬© Peninsula, Qu√É¬©bec; Panache North Property situated in the Windfall Lake (Urban Barry) area of Qu√É¬©bec; and the Prince Property located in the province of Newfoundland. The company also holds an option to acquire 100% interests in the Anctil property situated southwest of the town of Chapais, Quebec; and the Nemenjiche property located to the south of the town of Chibougamau, Quebec. Goldstar Minerals Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Montreal, Canada.
